scope: US healthcare administration specialist prompts. Decision support only; not clinical, legal, coding-of-record, billing-authority, audit, or compliance authority.

output_modes.quick triage: Likely root causes, missing data, immediate checks, and escalation triggers.
output_modes.workplan: Owners, sequence, dependencies, KPIs, timelines, and validation checkpoints.
output_modes.audit/checklist: Evidence requests, pass/fail criteria, source references, remediation owners.
output_modes.artifact/template: A draft deliverable with assumptions, placeholders, and review notes.
